title: Dave Inc. Q4 2024 and Full Year Earnings Report
text:
Dave reported exceptional fourth-quarter results, with operating revenues reaching $100.9 million, representing 38% year-over-year growth. The company achieved net income of $16.8 million compared to $0.2 million in the prior year period.

Non-GAAP adjusted EBITDA surged to $33.4 million in Q4, up 234% annually and exceeding guidance targets. The variable profit margin expanded to 72%, up from 63% in the same quarter last year.

Full Year 2024 Results:
For the complete fiscal year, Dave generated $347.1 million in operating revenues, reflecting 34% growth versus 2023. The company swung to profitability with net income of $57.9 million, compared to a loss of $48.5 million in 2023. Full-year adjusted EBITDA totaled $86.5 million versus a loss of $10.1 million in 2023. Non-GAAP variable profit reached $238.5 million with a 69% margin.

Operational Metrics:
- Monthly transacting members increased 17% to 2.5 million
- ExtraCash originations grew 44% to $1.5 billion in Q4
- 28-day delinquency rate improved to 1.66%
- Customer acquisition cost remained efficient at $16 per customer
- Dave Debit Card spending climbed 24% to $457 million quarterly

2025 Guidance:
- Revenue: $415-435 million (20-25% growth)
- Adjusted EBITDA: $110-120 million (27-39% growth)

Management Commentary: CEO Jason Wilk emphasized that the company closed the year with record-setting results driven by member demand and execution. The new fee structure implemented in mid-Q1 2025 is expected to enhance ExtraCash limits and member lifetime value. The company completed a strategic partnership with Coastal Community Bank to serve as sponsor bank for ExtraCash and banking products.
